text.title: mutation-testing-ci-gate Failure Modes
text.summary: Failure modes observed when applying the mutation-testing-ci-gate methodology. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Full-repo mutation per PR; CI runtime jumps 8x; team disables the workflow.
antipattern.fix: Switch to scripts/incremental-mutator.sh; mutate only files in git diff.

antipattern.symptom: Equivalent mutants never triaged; score stays low forever; team stops believing it.
antipattern.fix: Run scripts/triage-survivors.py; tag equivalents; exclude from the kill-rate calculation.

antipattern.symptom: Engineer raises line coverage to 95% to compensate for low mutation; nothing changes.
antipattern.fix: Educate team: mutation score replaces line coverage as the honest signal; add a doc.

antipattern.symptom: Gate flipped to blocking on day 1; 60% of PRs red; mass bypass.
antipattern.fix: Re-enable continue-on-error: true; collect 14d telemetry; flip per-module after noise < 10%.
